#!/usr/bin/env pwsh
# Invoke-Bump.ps1 — entry-point script the workflow invokes.
# Wraps Invoke-VersionBump and prints a parsable line for CI assertions.

[CmdletBinding()]
param(
    [Parameter(Mandatory)][string]$VersionFile,
    [Parameter(Mandatory)][string]$CommitsFile,
    [string]$ChangelogFile = 'CHANGELOG.md',
    [string]$Date = (Get-Date -Format 'yyyy-MM-dd')
)

Set-StrictMode -Version 3.0
$ErrorActionPreference = 'Stop'

Import-Module (Join-Path $PSScriptRoot 'SemanticVersionBumper.psm1') -Force

try {
    $r = Invoke-VersionBump -VersionFile $VersionFile -CommitsFile $CommitsFile `
                            -ChangelogFile $ChangelogFile -Date $Date
    Write-Host "OldVersion=$($r.OldVersion)"
    Write-Host "BumpType=$($r.BumpType)"
    Write-Host "NewVersion=$($r.NewVersion)"
    # Stable single-line marker for the harness to grep on.
    Write-Host "RESULT::$($r.OldVersion)::$($r.BumpType)::$($r.NewVersion)"
}
catch {
    Write-Error "Version bump failed: $_"
    exit 1
}

input.content:
name: Semantic Version Bumper

on:
  push:
  pull_request:
  workflow_dispatch:
    inputs:
      version_file:
        description: 'Path to version file (package.json or VERSION)'
        required: false
        default: 'package.json'
      commits_file:
        description: 'Path to commits log fixture'
        required: false
        default: 'commits.txt'

permissions:
  contents: read

env:
  VERSION_FILE: ${{ github.event.inputs.version_file || 'package.json' }}
  COMMITS_FILE: ${{ github.event.inputs.commits_file || 'commits.txt' }}

jobs:
  bump:
    name: Run version bump
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - name: Check out repository
        uses: actions/checkout@v4

      - name: Show inputs
        shell: pwsh
        run: |
          Write-Host "VersionFile=$env:VERSION_FILE"
          Write-Host "CommitsFile=$env:COMMITS_FILE"
          Get-ChildItem -Force | Select-Object Name,Length

      - name: Run Pester unit tests
        shell: pwsh
        run: |
          Invoke-Pester -Path ./tests/SemanticVersionBumper.Tests.ps1 `
                        -Output Detailed -CI

      - name: Bump version
        shell: pwsh
        run: |
          ./Invoke-Bump.ps1 -VersionFile $env:VERSION_FILE `
                            -CommitsFile $env:COMMITS_FILE `
                            -ChangelogFile CHANGELOG.md `
                            -Date '2026-05-08'

      - name: Show changelog
        shell: pwsh
        run: |
          if (Test-Path CHANGELOG.md) {
              Write-Host '--- CHANGELOG.md ---'
              Get-Content CHANGELOG.md
          } else {
              Write-Host 'No changelog (no relevant commits).'
          }
